# ReNoUn — Structural Pattern Analysis Engine

> ReNoUn is a 17-channel structural analysis MCP server for AI conversations and financial risk management. It measures Recurrence, Novelty, and Unity patterns without analyzing semantic content. Patent Pending #63/923,592.

ReNoUn detects structural patterns across 17 channels organized into three dimensions: Recurrence (5 channels measuring pattern repetition), Novelty (6 channels measuring new information entering), and Unity (6 channels measuring coherence). It identifies 8 constellation patterns including CLOSED_LOOP, CONVERGENCE, SCATTERING, PATTERN_BREAK, and others.

The finance module analyzes OHLCV candle data and outputs an exposure scalar (0.0-1.0) for position sizing. Validated on 31 datasets across 9 crypto assets and 5 timeframes with 100% drawdown reduction (5.7pp average improvement) at a cost of approximately 0.1 Sharpe ratio.

## Core Tools

- [renoun_analyze](https://github.com/98lukehall/renoun-mcp#renoun_analyze): Full 17-channel structural analysis of conversation utterances. Returns DHS (Dialectical Health Score), constellation patterns, channel breakdowns, and recommendations.
- [renoun_health_check](https://github.com/98lukehall/renoun-mcp#renoun_health_check): Fast structural triage returning one score, one pattern, one summary. Sub-50ms response.
- [renoun_compare](https://github.com/98lukehall/renoun-mcp#renoun_compare): Structural A/B comparison between two conversation sessions. Shows health trajectory, constellation transitions, and channel shifts.
- [renoun_pattern_query](https://github.com/98lukehall/renoun-mcp#renoun_pattern_query): Save, query, and trend longitudinal pattern history across sessions.
- [renoun_steer](https://github.com/98lukehall/renoun-mcp#renoun_steer): Real-time inference steering with rolling window analysis. Emits signals when structural thresholds are crossed.
- [renoun_finance_analyze](https://github.com/98lukehall/renoun-mcp#renoun_finance_analyze): Structural analysis of OHLCV financial data. Returns DHS, constellation patterns, stress levels, and exposure scalar recommendations.

## Documentation

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/98lukehall/renoun-mcp): Full source code, README, API documentation, and examples
- [PyPI Package](https://pypi.org/project/renoun-mcp/): Install via `pip install renoun-mcp`
- [Pricing](https://harrisoncollab.com/pricing.html): Free open source, $4.99/mo Conversation Pro, $7.99/mo Finance Risk Overlay
- [Website](https://harrisoncollab.com): Landing page with interactive demo

## Key Facts

- 17 structural channels across Recurrence (Re1-Re5), Novelty (No1-No6), and Unity (Un1-Un6)
- 8 constellation patterns: CLOSED_LOOP, HIGH_SYMMETRY, PATTERN_BREAK, CONVERGENCE, SCATTERING, REPEATED_DISRUPTION, DIP_AND_RECOVERY, SURFACE_VARIATION
- DHS (Dialectical Health Score) range: 0.0-1.0 where higher is healthier
- Finance exposure scalar: 0.0-1.0 where lower means more structural disorder
- Backtested results: 31/31 drawdown reduction, 5.7pp average, 7/8 black swan events caught
- Black swan validation: COVID crash, LUNA collapse, FTX contagion, China mining ban
- Built by Luke Hall at Harrison Collab
- Patent Pending #63/923,592

## Optional

- [Interactive Demo](https://harrisoncollab.com/#demo): Try the analysis engine in-browser with sample data
- [Cowork Plugin](https://harrisoncollab.com): ReNoUn plugin for Claude desktop with 5 built-in skills
